item.text: I’m checking the workspace manifests directly and will verify which crate `Cargo.toml` files list `orbit-knowledge` as a dependency entry, excluding the root manifest.
The first pass didn’t match anything, so I’m widening the search to inspect workspace manifests and catch `workspace = true` or table-style dependency declarations.
I found two candidate manifests. I’m opening those files with line numbers to verify the entries sit under dependency sections, not elsewhere in the file.

item.text: I’ve verified the two matching crate manifests directly. I’m doing one last count check from the manifest search so the total is grounded in a tool result too.
The quick count included `crates/orbit-knowledge/Cargo.toml` because the package names itself there. I’m tightening the match to dependency-assignment syntax only.
